notes: New: Institutional Confidence Score (ICS) engine replaces FTS binary gate. 6-component weighted score (TL 30%+BQ 25%+MS 15%+TR 10%+MOM 10%+EX 10%) with verbose log per signal. Three modes in FILTERS: Aggressive=80 / Balanced=85 (default) / Conservative=90. Balanced mode = good trendline + decent breakout passes — never over-filters.
